statement: In every magma, Equation 1509 (`x = (y * x) * (z * (z * w))`) implies Equation 983 (`x = y * ((z * z) * (y * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0385
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op z (op z w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z z) (op y z)))
